NotFound.heading: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
NotFound.terminal:
$ cd /page
-bash: cd: /page: No such file or directory
$ find / -name 'page' -type f
find: No results found.
$ echo $?

Hero.description: For over 50 years, Stellenbosch's Computer Science Department has been at the forefront of innovation — advancing research and developing leaders who drive technology and discovery globally.

Features.title: Why Stellenbosch CS?
Features.subtitle: Discover what makes our department a leader in computer science education and research.
Features.worldClassDescription: Undergraduate and postgraduate degrees designed to produce industry-ready graduates.
Features.researchDescription: Active research groups in AI, machine learning, data science, and cybersecurity.
Features.communityDescription: A collaborative environment connecting students, academics, and industry partners.
Features.globalDescription: Our alumni work at leading tech companies and research institutions worldwide.
Features.facultyDescription: Learn from internationally recognised researchers and experienced educators.
Features.handsOnDescription: Project-based curricula that prepare you for real-world software engineering challenges.

Programmes.title: Our Programmes
Programmes.subtitle: From undergraduate foundations to postgraduate research, find the right path for your career.
Programmes.bscDescription: A three-year undergraduate degree offering a strong foundation in algorithms, systems, and software engineering.
Programmes.honsDescription: An intensive honours year with advanced coursework and a research project in a specialist area.
Programmes.mscDescription: Postgraduate research programmes supervised by leading academics across multiple focus areas.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.description: Have questions about our programmes, research, or anything else? We'd love to hear from you.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.subtitle: Get in touch with the Computer Science Department at Stellenbosch University.
ContactPage.visitTitle: Want to pay us a visit?
ContactPage.visitText: The department is currently located on the fifth floor of the General Engineering building.

Footer.tagline: Advancing computer science education and research at Stellenbosch University for over 50 years.

ProgrammesWizard.heroSubtitle: Answer a few quick questions and we'll point you to the right information about Computer Science at Stellenbosch.
ProgrammesWizard.chooseLevelTitle: What level of study are you interested in?
ProgrammesWizard.chooseLevelSubtitle: Select the level that best matches where you are in your academic journey.
ProgrammesWizard.undergraduateDesc: A 3-year BSc degree building strong foundations in algorithms, systems, and software engineering.
ProgrammesWizard.postgraduateDesc: Advanced study and research — Honours, Masters, or PhD in Computer Science.
ProgrammesWizard.choosePgSubtitle: Select the programme level you're interested in.
ProgrammesWizard.honoursDesc: One-year structured programme with coursework and a research project.
ProgrammesWizard.mastersDesc: Thesis-based research programme, typically 1–2 years. Includes a structured MSc in ML & AI.
ProgrammesWizard.phdDesc: Doctoral research producing an original contribution to Computer Science.
ProgrammesWizard.situationTitle: Tell us a bit about yourself
ProgrammesWizard.situationSubtitle: This helps us recommend the most relevant pages and resources for you.
ProgrammesWizard.situationProspectiveDesc: I'm considering applying and want to learn about admissions, requirements, and what to expect.
ProgrammesWizard.situationCurrentDesc: I'm already studying at Stellenbosch and exploring my CS options or planning my next year.
ProgrammesWizard.situationInternationalDesc: I'm based outside South Africa and interested in studying CS at Stellenbosch.
ProgrammesWizard.situationProspectiveDescPg: I'm considering applying for postgraduate study and want to know about entry requirements and the application process.
ProgrammesWizard.situationCurrentDescPg: I'm finishing my current degree at SU and looking to continue with postgraduate CS.
ProgrammesWizard.situationInternationalDescPg: I'm an international student interested in postgraduate study at Stellenbosch.
ProgrammesWizard.resultsSubtitle: Based on your selections, these pages will be most helpful for you.
ProgrammesWizard.tipUgProspective: Start with the Prospective Students page — it covers everything from admission requirements and APS scores to how to apply. Applications typically open mid-year for the following February intake.
ProgrammesWizard.tipUgCurrent: Check the Programme Guide for focal areas and curriculum planning. If you're considering Honours after your BSc, you'll need at least 60% in most third-year CS modules.
ProgrammesWizard.tipUgInternational: International students should apply through Stellenbosch University's central admissions. You'll need to have your qualifications evaluated by SAQA and may need a study visa — start early!
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgProspectiveHons: Honours applications for the following year typically close around October. You'll need a BSc with Computer Science as a major and at least 60% in most third-year modules.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgProspectiveMsc: To apply for a Masters, you'll need an Honours degree (or equivalent) in Computer Science. Start by finding a potential supervisor whose research interests match yours.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgProspectivePhd: PhD applicants need a Masters degree (or exceptional Honours) in Computer Science. Contact potential supervisors early — securing a supervisor is the first step.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgCurrentHons: As a current student, you can apply directly through the department. Chat with lecturers about potential Honours project topics — it makes the transition much smoother.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgCurrentMsc: Since you're already at SU, reach out to researchers in the department whose work interests you. The department's research groups page is a great place to start.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgCurrentPhd: Talk to your current supervisor or other faculty members about PhD opportunities. If you're finishing your MSc, discuss the possibility of continuing with your thesis supervisor.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgInternationalHons: International Honours applicants should apply through Stellenbosch University's postgraduate admissions. You'll need SAQA evaluation of your qualifications and a study visa.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgInternationalMsc: International Masters students can study part-time from abroad in some cases. Contact the department to discuss arrangements with a potential supervisor.
ProgrammesWizard.tipPgInternationalPhd: International PhD students are welcome. Some funding opportunities exist through NRF and SU bursaries. Contact a potential supervisor to discuss your research proposal.

Metadata.title: Computer Science | Stellenbosch University
Metadata.description: Website for the Computer Science Department at Stellenbosch University. Explore our programmes, research, and community.
Metadata.keywords: computer science, stellenbosch university, south africa, BSc, honours, masters, PhD, programming, algorithms, machine learning, AI
Metadata.homeDescription: Discover the Computer Science Department at Stellenbosch University — over 50 years of excellence in education, research, and innovation.
Metadata.contactDescription: Get in touch with the Computer Science Department at Stellenbosch University. Find our address, phone, email, and office location.
Metadata.programmesDescription: Answer a few questions to find the right Computer Science programme at Stellenbosch University — undergraduate, honours, masters, or PhD.
Metadata.researchDescription: Explore research at Stellenbosch University's CS Department — automata theory, software engineering, machine learning, AI, and telecommunications.
Metadata.ugModulesDescription: Browse all undergraduate Computer Science modules at Stellenbosch University, organised by year — from first year to fourth year.
Metadata.ugGuideDescription: Everything you need to know about the BSc Computer Science degree at Stellenbosch University — focal areas, curriculum, and degree structure.
Metadata.ugProspectiveDescription: Admissions, requirements, and how to apply for undergraduate Computer Science at Stellenbosch University.
Metadata.pgModulesDescription: Browse Honours, Masters, and PhD Computer Science modules at Stellenbosch University — advanced algorithms, AI, machine learning, and more.
Metadata.pgProspectiveDescription: Entry requirements, application process, and funding information for postgraduate Computer Science at Stellenbosch University.
Metadata.pgHonoursDescription: A one-year full-time honours programme in Computer Science at Stellenbosch University — coursework, research project, and career preparation.
Metadata.pgMastersDescription: Thesis-based Masters in Computer Science at Stellenbosch University — world-class research supervision and career outcomes.
Metadata.pgPhdDescription: Doctoral research in Computer Science at Stellenbosch University — original contributions alongside internationally recognised researchers.

HomeShowcase.title: Where Code Meets Discovery
HomeShowcase.subtitle: From algorithms to artificial intelligence, our researchers and students push the boundaries of what's possible in computer science.

ResearchPreview.title: Research That Matters
ResearchPreview.subtitle: Our faculty and students explore pioneering areas across the full spectrum of computer science.

Journey.title: Your Academic Journey
Journey.subtitle: Chart your path through Computer Science at Stellenbosch — from first-year foundations to doctoral research.
Journey.bscDesc: Build a strong foundation in algorithms, programming, systems, and software engineering.
Journey.honsDesc: Intensive honours year with advanced coursework and a research project in your specialist area.
Journey.mscDesc: Thesis-based research programme supervised by leading academics in your chosen focus area.
Journey.phdDesc: Doctoral research producing an original contribution to the field of Computer Science.
